Build the future of banking. Zeta is a next-generation banking technology company providing cloud-native, fully stackable processing and core banking platforms for issuers. With a focus on scalability, compliance, and innovation, Zeta empowers financial institutions to modernize their technology infrastructure and deliver secure, seamless digital banking experiences. Our impact runs at real-world scale. Today, over 25 million cards are live on Zeta-powered platforms across 7 countries, supported by a passionate team of 1,700+ Zetanauts across India, the US, EMEA, and Asia. Backed by SoftBank Vision Fund, Mastercard , and other reputed strategic investors, we reached a valuation of $2 billion in 2025. Our focus is on establishing product lines that focus on key outcomes by addressing real customer pain points, modernizing legacy systems, and strengthening core fundamentals. As a result, our systems and platforms support a wide range of banking and payments capabilities, including: Tachyon, our cloud-native banking stack built for population-scale systems Cipher, our unified authentication platform for secure, high-volume banking environments Digital Credit as a Service, enabling banks to launch credit lines on UPI Elena, our intelligent and conversational AI platform for banking Pixel, India’s first digital-native credit card, launched in partnership with HDFC Bank, for whom we also revamped their PayZapp mobile app: Winner of the Celent Model Bank Award for Payments Innovation 2024 Sparrow, the leading card experience for non-prime cardholders in the US…and more across cards, payments, lending, and core banking We are an engineering-first organization that values ownership, bias for action, and long-term thinking. Together, we solve some of the hardest problems in banking tech. Our culture is built around trust, collaboration, and creating the conditions for you to drive impact proportionate to your potential. Reinforcing our commitment to creating an inclusive and supportive workplace, we have been consistently recognized as a Great Place to Work . If you want to build cutting-edge banking tech that enables banks to serve millions reliably, securely, and at a population scale, Zeta is your playground. If you would like to learn more about how we have grown and evolved over the years, watch our journey here . You can also explore our website and follow us on LinkedIn , Instagram, YouTube , and X . About The Role As a Product Manager in the Meridian team, you will have the opportunity to work on innovative products and features that enhance user experiences and drive long-term growth for our customers. Your role will cut through the entire product development lifecycle for your assigned charter - encompassing product development, research, analytics, execution and growth. You will collaborate with peers across product management, UX design, software engineering, data science, and business functions. Responsibilities Product Development Work closely with product, design and engineering teams to define and document detailed product requirements, ensuring they align with the overall product and business strategy. Engage in agile development processes, including sprint planning, backlog refinement, and daily stand-ups, to drive the timely release of product features. Product Documentation Create comprehensive product documentation, including user guides and release notes, to support internal teams and external clients. Market Research Dive deep into market trends, user needs, and competitor landscapes to inform product decisions and enhancements Data Analysis Utilise data-driven insights to evaluate product performance, identify improvement areas, and make informed recommendations for enhancements. Quality Assurance Collaborate with QA teams to define test cases, conduct testing, and ensure the delivery of high-quality products to end-users. Skills Analytical Thinking & Research orientation Proficient in data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, or equivalent. Ability to interpret complex data sets and derive actionable insights - analyze data, identify patterns and make data-driven decisions. Experience conducting user research and usability testing. Communication Excellent written and verbal communication skills for articulation of product requirements, effective collaboration and stakeholder management. Tools & Processes Proficiency in using product management tools, such as Jira and Confluence. Familiarity with agile development processes and principles. Technical Acumen Good understanding of technology stacks and the ability to engage effectively with technical teams. Knowledge of APIs and their role in modern software development. Collaboration Strong collaborative skills, working effectively with cross-functional teams including design, development, and QA. Experience facilitating productive discussions and workshops. Experience And Qualifications 3 to 6 years in a Product Management, prior experience building fintech consumer products / platforms at scale Experience in developing modern, cloud-native mobile / web products and interfaces with contemporary UI/UX patterns Software Engineering / Technical background An MBA from a Tier 1 school would be a bonus Equal Opportunity Zeta is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds, cultures, and communities to apply and believe that a diverse workforce is key to our success We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Description TripleTen is an award-winning online school among technology bootcamps. Our mission is to help people change their lives and succeed in technology. We offer flexibility in studies, career mentoring, resume and portfolio preparation, and we guarantee employment after the course. Our employability rate among graduates is 87% across our Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA), Data Analytics, and Data Science programs. 🚀Join our team as a Sales Country Manager in the dynamic field of educational technology! We're on the lookout for a motivated, sales-oriented leader to drive our expansion. What You Will Do Achieve the sales objectives by developing and executing effective sales strategies. Form and lead sales teams (Closers), providing guidance, motivation, and support to ensure the achievement of targets. Lead the team of up to 7 Sales Supervisors with up to 10 closers in each team. Oversee day-to-day operations of the team, including customer interactions and sales processes. Identify opportunities for growth and efficiency improvements within the sales department, implementing initiatives to optimize performance and maximize results. Collaborate with cross-functional teams. Monitor and analyze sales performance metrics, providing regular reports and insights to senior management. Recruit, train, and develop sales representatives to build a high-performing team. Stay informed about market trends, competitor activities, and industry developments to inform strategic decision-making and maintain a competitive edge. Produce weekly and monthly sales reports. Requirements 3+ years of previous experience in a managerial or supervisory role. 5+ years experience in B2C sales. Previous experience as a Head of Sales for B2C companies, Commercial Director or Sales Director leading 50+ people. Fluency in Spanish and English(at least B2/C1). Project management and time management skills. Strong analytical skills and experience working with KPIs and sales metrics. Experience with HubSpot or similar CRM. What We Can Offer You Work in a rapidly growing team with great results and ambitious targets. Competitive salary and bonus in USD. Full-time remote collaboration: a 5-day working week, where you choose 4 active days from Monday to Friday, plus 1 additional day on either Saturday or Sunday. Hours: 12 PM - 9 PM CDMX for Monday to Friday and 10 AM – 7 PM CDMX for Saturday or Sunday . Convenient digital office with collaboration tools like Slack, Miro, Notion. Professional freedom, where we trust your experience instead of wasting each other’s time and effort micromanaging. International team of industry leaders.

Solid understanding of business process improvement, with a working knowledge of how AI and automation can streamline workflows and boost efficiency. Comfortable providing constructive and actionable feedback to junior professionals or students. Ideally experienced in presentation coaching, mentoring, or guiding others in their professional development. Clear and confident communicator who can explain technical or complex concepts in a simple and engaging way. Nice to have: Experience working directly with stakeholders or clients to identify needs, pitch solutions, and drive adoption of automation tools. titulo: QA Automation Engineer (Playwright) - Remote Work | REF#294618
descripcion: At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley. Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide. When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success. QA Automation Engineer (Playwright) at BairesDev In this role, you'll own the entire QA domain for a fast-moving startup while also covering first-line customer support during US time zones. Combining automation engineering with direct customer interaction, you'll build advanced test suites, analyze root causes, and patch minor issues directly on git branches. This is your opportunity to have real ownership and variety in a startup environment, working with cutting-edge AI-assisted development tools while directly impacting both product quality and customer satisfaction. What You'll Do Build and maintain advanced automated test suites using Playwright. Manage the entire QA domain, including root cause analysis and bug reporting. Handle first-line customer support via Intercom during US time zones. Use AI-assisted development tools to accelerate testing workflows. Patch minor issues directly on git branches for core team review. Interact with agentic QA tools to improve testing coverage and efficiency. What We Are Looking For 3+ years of experience in QA automation. Strong proficiency in Playwright. Experience with Claude Code or AI-assisted development tools. Strong communication skills for customer-facing support. Availability to work in US time zones. Advanced proficiency in English. How we do make your work (and your life) easier: 100% remote work (from anywhere). Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred Hardware and software setup for you to work from home. Flexible hours: create your own schedule. Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays. Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent. Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities. Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact! Apply now!

Solid understanding of business process improvement, with a working knowledge of how AI and automation can streamline workflows and boost efficiency. Comfortable providing constructive and actionable feedback to junior professionals or students. Clear and confident communicator who can explain technical or complex concepts in a simple and engaging way. titulo: Technical Product Manager (OTE $70,000/year USD), Sparkrock Finance
descripcion: Are you a high-performing Technical Product Manager with strategic vision and deep technical expertise? Do you want to work for a best-in-class, 100% remote organization with the brightest talent from around the world? If so, then keep reading… At Sparkrock, we help social benefit organizations—such as nonprofits, school boards, and government agencies—reach their full potential through technology. Every day, over 150,000 people use our ERP and product platforms to work more efficiently, freeing up time and resources to focus on the good they want to achieve. As a Technical Product Manager, you will own the technical product direction of Sparkrock’s Finance ERP, powering mission-driven organizations across the Non-Profit and Education sectors. This role goes beyond writing requirements - you will define the technical vision, design scalable financial solutions, and work closely with engineering, customers, and go-to-market teams to deliver reliable, compliant, and high-impact financial systems. In this role, you’ll take true end-to-end ownership of a core ERP Finance product that serves Non-Profit and K-12 organizations, giving you the chance to shape both product strategy and technical architecture in meaningful ways. You’ll work closely with customers, finance teams, and implementation partners, tackling complex, real-world finance challenges while balancing strategic thinking with hands-on technical design. The work offers a unique opportunity to modernize and scale financial systems through cloud technologies, automation, and analytics, directly improving transparency, compliance, and operational efficiency for mission-driven organizations. While the finance domain brings rigor, regulatory complexity, and constant trade-offs between speed, correctness, and flexibility, it also provides a deeply rewarding environment where thoughtful design, collaboration, and precision can have a lasting, positive impact. If you thrive at the intersection of finance domain expertise, ERP systems, and the Non-Profit industry vertical and technical architecture, this role is for you. Responsibilities Finance Domain Ownership: Own product and technical design for core Sparkrock Finance capabilities such as General Ledger, AP, AR, budgeting, fund accounting, reporting, and integrations Requirement Discovery & Analysis: Partner with customers, implementation teams, and internal stakeholders to translate finance business needs into clear technical and functional requirements Solution & Architecture Design: Design scalable, secure, and compliant financial solutions, including workflows, integrations, data models, and APIs Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with engineering, QA, implementation, and customer success to ensure solutions are feasible, maintainable, and aligned with product vision Documentation & Specifications: Produce detailed functional and technical specifications, diagrams, and decision records Technical Validation & Risk Management: Evaluate trade-offs, ensure accounting correctness, performance, auditability, and compliance considerations are addressed Release Readiness: Ensure features are production-ready with clear rollout plans, documentation, and stakeholder communication Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field 5+ years in the software industry (technical consultant, architect, developer, or solution designer) 2+ years as a Technical Product Manager or similar role Proven experience working on ERP Finance products or large-scale financial systems Strong understanding of ERP Finance concepts: general ledger, accounts payable & accounts receivable, budgeting & forecasting, fund/grant accounting, financial reporting & audits, non-profit financial workflows Experience designing scalable, secure backend systems API and integration design (REST, event-driven systems) Data modeling for financial systems Familiarity with cloud platforms (Azure preferred, AWS acceptable) Understanding of security, access controls, and audit logging Non-Profit or Public Sector finance experience Strong communication with both finance and technical audiences Ability to translate accounting concepts into technical designs Stakeholder management across customers and internal teams Structured problem-solving and decision-making Comfort working in ambiguity and evolving requirements Exposure to compliance standards (e.g., audit requirements, internal controls) Experience supporting implementations or migrations of ERP finance systems Tools expertise: Agile tools: Jira, Confluence Prototyping Tools: Lovable, Replit, Bolt, or similar Diagramming tools: Lucidchart, Miro, Visio, Figma Dev tools exposure: Git, Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines Nice to have Experience in the K12 education or Non-Profit sector Hands-on experience with ERP systems or financial management software Benefits We don’t call them perks; they’re just part of what makes working at Sparkrock great. We are 100% remote and global. Live your best life wherever that may be, and never lose out on career opportunities because of it Flexible work hours. We work asynchronously and don’t care when you’re online, just that you deliver great results and are there for our customers We are dedicated to your growth with consistent and meaningful feedback, support in achieving your personal career goals, and access to leading-edge tools, playbooks, and technology to amplify your experience Introductions to thought leaders in the space and webinars on cutting-edge tech hot topics Stipend to help set up your ideal home office Focus on culture: coffee chats, happy hours, cooking classes, book clubs, and more! We strive to build a team that reflects the diversity of the community we work in and encourage applications from traditionally underrepresented groups such as women, visible minorities, Indigenous peoples, people identifying as LGBTQ2SI, veterans, and people with disabilities. All open roles are for existing vacancies unless otherwise communicated to the candidate. We are committed to keeping candidates informed throughout the process and will notify all interviewed applicants of our hiring decision within 45 days of their interview. Sparkrock retains all job postings and related recruitment information for a minimum of three years. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley. Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide. When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success. Staffing Solution Architect at BairesDev As a Staffing Solution Architect, you will be responsible for overseeing the definition of the skills required by the client for staffing augmentation purposes and ensuring that we are aligned with them in sourcing the people they need for their projects. This is a great opportunity for a professional looking to develop with one of the fastest-growing companies in the industry. What you will do: - Drive and manage the technology assessment and validation processes and liaise with clients, providing technical support and guidance to meet the real needs of their profile requirements. Conduct the final screening and interviewing of candidates based on the available information to identify the best engineers for each position. - Participate in meetings with clients to understand the engineering profile that fits their needs - Work with different tech stacks, interact with clients or interview across the tech stack: Web (frontend and backend), mobile, QA (manual and automation), DevOps, data (data engineering, data science, big data), etc. - Stay current on market trends and technologies you may not have worked with previously. - Train candidates in a variety of technologies. - Collaborate with the sales team to improve the time-to-market of the resources that clients require, while keeping the feasibility of their requests in mind. Here’s what we are looking for: - 5+ years of work experience. - Previous experience in the IT industry - A proven track record in software development with experience/knowledge in various programming languages and software development domains. - Strong technical presentation and communication skills. - Advanced level of English. How we do make your work (and your life) easier: - 100% remote work (from anywhere). - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home. - Flexible hours: create your own schedule. - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays. - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent. - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities. Apply now and become part of a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive!

En Devsu buscamos un/a Sr Business Analyst / Experto Funcional Senior con sólida experiencia en arquitectura transaccional bancaria para participar en la implementación y evolución de un Switch Transaccional dentro de una importante entidad financiera. El rol tendrá responsabilidad sobre el levantamiento, análisis y modelado de procesos end-to-end asociados a transacciones monetarias críticas, asegurando alta disponibilidad, trazabilidad y cumplimiento regulatorio. Además, será el nexo entre el Product Owner y los equipos de Negocio, Arquitectura, Desarrollo, DevSecOps, SQA, Infraestructura, Cloud y Datos. Adicionalmente, podrá participar en iniciativas relacionadas con Payment Hub y ecosistemas de pagos , colaborando en la definición funcional de transferencias nacionales e internacionales, remesas y recaudos. Es presencial en la ciudad de Quito, Ecuador , y estará asignad a a uno de nuestros clientes más importantes del sector financiero/bancario de Latinoamérica, participando en iniciativas tecnológicas críticas con foco en estabilidad, calidad y mejora continua. Responsabilidades: Documentar en inglés requerimientos funcionales y no funcionales, diagramas de flujo y guías de implementación. Liderar levantamiento y modelado de procesos del Switch Transaccional. Documentar requerimientos funcionales y no funcionales en inglés. Definir flujos para pagos, transferencias, autorizaciones y reversos. Coordinar equipos multidisciplinarios (Desarrollo, QA, Arquitectura, DevSecOps, Infraestructura, Cloud y Datos). Gestionar riesgos técnicos y dependencias entre sistemas. Participar en iniciativas de mejora continua y estabilización de plataformas críticas. Colaborar en proyectos vinculados a Payment Hub cuando aplique Requirements +4 años de experiencia en el sector bancario. Experiencia en implementación o evolución de Switches transaccionales, Payment Hub o sistemas core financieros. +3 años de experiencia en procesos operativos de transacciones monetarias. +4 años en roles de liderazgo funcional o técnico en proyectos de TI. Experiencia coordinando equipos multidisciplinarios (Desarrollo, QA/SQA, Arquitectura, DevSecOps, Infraestructura, Cloud y Datos). Conocimiento sólido del ciclo de vida de desarrollo de software (SDLC) y prácticas de calidad end-to-end. Experiencia en entornos regulados o de alta criticidad (ideal sector financiero). Experiencia trabajando bajo metodologías ágiles (Scrum y/o Kanban). Manejo de herramientas como Jira. Inglés intermedio para elaboración y comprensión de documentación técnica Benefits En Devsu, queremos crear un ambiente donde puedas prosperar tanto personal como profesionalmente. Al unirte a nuestro equipo, disfrutarás de: Un contrato estable a largo plazo con oportunidades de crecimiento profesional Seguro médico privado Programas continuos de capacitación, mentoría y aprendizaje para mantenerte a la vanguardia de la industria Acceso gratuito a recursos de capacitación en IA y herramientas de IA de última generación para elevar tu trabajo diario Una política flexible de tiempo libre remunerado (PTO) además de días festivos pagados Proyectos de software desafiantes de clase mundial para clientes en Estados Unidos y Latinoamérica Colaboración con algunos de los ingenieros de software más talentosos de Latinoamérica y Estados Unidos, en un entorno de trabajo diverso Únete a Devsu y descubre un lugar de trabajo que valora tu crecimiento, apoya tu bienestar y te empodera para generar un impacto global.

TripleTen is a service that empowers people, regardless of their prior experience, to embark on the exciting and challenging journey of mastering tech professions. Our bootcamps focus on training students in Data Analytics, Data Science, Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA) Engineering, and UX/UI Design — in an accessible and practical way, supporting them until they successfully thrive in a new career. 🚀 Our mission is to ensure that every student has the opportunity to successfully master a new profession, find their purpose, and become a valuable member of the tech industry. What is our goal? We are continuously looking for experienced Data Science professionals who want to support and guide our students on their path to becoming professional developers. This is a full-time teaching role with an expectation of 40 hours per week . The schedule can be flexible, but you must be consistently available to support students throughout their learning journey. How to apply? Apply here. We review applications on a rolling basis, and candidates whose profiles align with the role will be invited to complete a digital interview, and complete a short technical test task. If a vacancy is available, we will assign it to you right away; otherwise, we will keep your profile and completed task on file for future opportunities. 📌 Please submit your CV in English. What you will do: Host regular live Q&A sessions to help students unblock and progress confidently Offer personalized support through 1:1 video calls to answer questions and guide assignments Occasionally respond to student questions via direct messages Lead live lessons on core program topics and industry-relevant skills Share your professional insights and best practices to support the learning community Review student projects and provide feedback based on program standards Write clear, actionable feedback to help students improve and meet expectations Support students in text by explaining concepts, troubleshooting code, and clarifying project or review questions Requirements: More than 2 years of experience working as a Data Scientist. Experience working as an analyst using Python. More than 1 year of experience working on machine learning projects. Familiarity with libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn. Intermediate English level. Native or advanced Spanish proficiency. What we can offer you: Training in mentoring and communication techniques. The opportunity to teach while continuing your main job. The chance to share knowledge and experience with developers within our community. Cross-cultural collaboration experience through mentoring and webinar facilitation. Remote collaboration with a schedule that is convenient for both you and the team. We do not focus on micromanagement. A comfortable digital office environment. We use modern digital tools such as Miro, Notion, Zoom, and others to ensure smooth collaboration. A diverse and close-knit team distributed across the U.S. and Latin America.

En Alpha Builders, buscamos un Project Manager estratégico y orientado a resultados para liderar nuestros próximos desafíos arquitectónicos. Tu misión será comandar la ejecución integral de proyectos de edificación, garantizando la máxima rentabilidad financiera, el cumplimiento de plazos y los más altos estándares de calidad y seguridad. Misión del puesto: Como Project Manager, serás el director de orquesta entre la tecnología BIM y la ejecución en campo. Reportando directamente a la Dirección de Proyectos, liderarás al equipo técnico (Superintendencia, Residentes y BIM) para asegurar que cada metro cuadrado construido cumpla con nuestra promesa de valor. Requisitos: Formación: Ingeniería Civil, Industrial o Arquitectura (Título de 3er nivel). Experiencia Comprobada: Haber liderado como PM al menos 2 proyectos de edificios desde su inicio hasta la entrega final. Mínimo 3 años en Residencia de Obra. Mínimo 2 años en Planificación y 1 año en Control de Costos. Experticia Técnica: Dominio profundo de Curva S y metodologías de control de plazos. Gestión avanzada de presupuestos y análisis de rentabilidad. Experiencia sólida en trámites y gestiones ante entidades municipales y gubernamentales. Sólidos conocimientos en Aseguramiento de Calidad (QA/QC) y Seguridad Industrial. Tecnología: Familiaridad con entornos de trabajo BIM (Revit/Navisworks) y software de planificación (MS Project/Primavera). Responsabilidades clave: Liderar y supervisar directamente al Superintendente de Obra y al equipo BIM. Monitorear el desempeño del proyecto mediante el análisis de la Curva S y toma de acciones preventivas/correctivas. Garantizar la rentabilidad financiera del proyecto mediante un control de costos riguroso. Asegurar la entrega final del activo en condiciones óptimas de habitabilidad. Gestionar indirectamente la cadena de suministros (Compras y Bodega) para garantizar el flujo de materiales.

WHO ARE WE? Launch Potato is a profitable digital media company that reaches over 30M+ monthly visitors through brands such as FinanceBuzz, All About Cookies, and OnlyInYourState. As The Discovery and Conversion Company, our mission is to connect consumers with the world’s leading brands through data-driven content and technology. Headquartered in South Florida with a remote-first team spanning over 15 countries, we’ve built a high-growth, high-performance culture where speed, ownership, and measurable impact drive success. WHY JOIN US? At Launch Potato, you’ll accelerate your career by owning outcomes, moving fast, and driving impact with a global team of high-performers. WHY YOU WANT THIS ROLE: Ready to level up your media buying career with a world-class US company—all from the comfort of your home? This is your chance to grow into a Media Buying expert, managing large-scale budgets and driving real results for top advertisers. No prior native experience? No problem. We’ll guide you with mentorship, data-driven strategies, and hands-on training across platforms like Taboola and Outbrain. At Launch Potato, you'll collaborate with a diverse, high-performing team across the Americas, gaining global experience in one of the most exciting spaces in digital media: Finance and Money Management. If you’re looking for a role where you’re trusted, supported, and set up to thrive, this is it. MUST HAVE: Hands-on experience running social or native ad campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Taboola, Outbrain Proven ability to monitor and optimize campaign performance using data Strong attention to detail with a focus on executional excellence and task management Ability to collaborate across functions and communicate clearly in a remote work environment Display an attitude of positivity and willingness to embrace change, not getting discouraged when business or cross-functional needs change Passion for performance marketing and a desire to grow within the Make Money/Manage Money vertical of our largest brand, FinanceBuzz This role will require occasional campaign monitoring after hours or on weekends, as needed. EXPERIENCE: 3+ years of media buying experience, with a focus on performance-driven results across social and native ad campaigns YOUR ROLE Support the success and growth of our Make Money/Manage Money native and social media campaigns by executing campaign builds, monitoring performance, and assisting in optimizations that help scale winning strategies. OUTCOMES Execute and manage social and native ad campaigns across platforms such Meta and Taboola Monitor daily performance metrics and implement optimizations to creative, bids, and placements Partner with senior media buyers to launch new campaigns and expand existing ones while supporting strategic growth Facilitate creative testing by assisting with copy iteration, image/video swaps, and tracking results Conduct competitor research and performance audits to surface new testing opportunities Collaborate with the Content and Paid Media teams to ensure seamless campaign setup and timely asset delivery Maintain campaign documentation and update performance trackers regularly to support team throughput COMPETENCIES Execution-Oriented: Manages deliverables independently and consistently follows through on tasks that enable campaign momentum and growth. Detail-Driven: Demonstrates accuracy in reporting, campaign QA, and implementation of optimizations. Organized and Fast-Learning: You prioritize competing tasks effectively and quickly pick up on new trends or approaches to optimize your campaigns. Analytical Thinker: Understand key ad metrics and translate data into actionable strategies that improve funnel performance. Collaborative: Works effectively across team lines with buyers, content creators, and analysts to move campaigns forward. Curious & Analytical: Asks the right questions, seeks to understand performance drivers, and uses data to guide recommendations. Proactive Communicator: Provides regular updates, flags issues early, and clearly communicates changes or learnings to stakeholders. Coachability: Open to feedback, quickly applies learnings, and demonstrates a strong desire to grow into a more strategic buyer. Want to accelerate your career? Apply now! Since day one, we've been committed to having a diverse, inclusive team and culture. We are proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity company. We value diversity, equity, and inclusion. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

About the Role We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Email Marketing Coder to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and deploying email marketing campaigns across various internal systems, ensuring high-quality performance, and maintaining a strong adherence to industry best practices. You will work closely with the creative, marketing, and technical teams to bring designs to life and optimize campaigns for maximum effectiveness. Your expertise will play a key role in enhancing our email marketing efforts and contributing to the overall success of our digital strategy. Responsibilities include but are not limited to; Email Coding & Development: Code responsive email templates based on design files provided by the creative team or direction from marketing managers. Ensure emails are optimized for various devices and email clients. Quality Assurance & Troubleshooting: Perform QA on HTML email files using tools such as Litmus, EmailOnAcid, or other similar inbox rendering tools. Troubleshoot and resolve any rendering or deliverability issues that arise during testing. Link Tracking: Generate and implement tracking codes for all links within email campaigns to ensure accurate performance tracking and reporting. Collaboration with Marketing: Work closely with marketing leads to define the scope for new projects, identifying opportunities for optimization and growth within the email marketing strategy. Industry Best Practices Compliance: Ensure that all email campaigns deployed across multiple internal systems adhere to industry best practices regarding design, accessibility, deliverability, and user engagement. Campaign Deployment: Oversee the deployment of email campaigns, ensuring timely execution while maintaining the integrity and quality of the final output. Requirements Experience: Minimum of 2+ years of hands-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC)., Klaviyo, Braze, Attentive or any other ESP. Technical Expertise: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, SQL, and email scripting languages such as Ampscript or Jinja. Strong experience with hand-coding HTML and CSS, particularly for responsive email design. Email Marketing Experience: 3 to 5 years of experience in the email marketing field, with a focus on email production, preferably using large enterprise email platforms. Project Management: Proven ability to manage multiple projects and collaborate with internal stakeholders and partners. Strong client-service skills with an ability to manage expectations and deadlines. Industry Knowledge: Solid understanding of email technologies, best practices, and current trends. Ability to troubleshoot and optimize campaigns for performance and deliverability. Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational skills with the ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple campaigns and deadlines with minimal oversight. Our interview process includes, but is not limited to the following: English, Excel and Typing Test We offer a competitive salary and benefits based on ability level, including: Base salary DOE Unlimited vacation policy Monthly phone/internet and food stipend Health insurance coverage Professional Development Program This is a fully remote role but must if based in Latin America Note. Please submit your resume in English. About WITHIN WITHIN is the world's first Performance Branding company, partnering with some of the biggest brands in the world to drive business growth through innovative marketing strategies. Our integrated operating model collapses the traditional marketing silos between creative and media, performance and brand, and across media channels. With a full suite of offerings including media, creative, SEO, Lifecycle, Retail Media, Affiliate and Influencer, we’re able to work with our brand partners in an integrated fashion, allowing us to align marketing strategies back to core business objectives. Client teams at WITHIN are trained on how to always act as a trusted business partner, acting as a fiduciary to client needs above our own. Teams at WITHIN have the ability to work with iconic brands such as The North Face, Timberland, Ben and Jerry's and Jose Cuervo. Everyone at WITHIN wants to grow and be challenged. titulo: Ingeniero de Ciberseguridad ITSA (Hibrido Quito)(Exp en Banca) K526
descripcion: Keppri Busca Product Owner (PO) – Experto Funcional con experiencia en Banca En Keppri, los seres humanos son el núcleo de nuestro desarrollo tecnológico. Somos una consultora enfocada en todo el ciclo de productos digitales, con amplia experiencia en los sectores financiero e inmobiliario. Si buscas un entorno donde el desarrollo personal y profesional es una prioridad, esta oportunidad es para ti. Tu Rol Experto Funcional Bancario - Product Owner (PO) Serás responsable de liderar la definición funcional y la evolución de productos digitales para un cliente del sector bancario. Actuarás como puente entre negocio y tecnología, asegurando que el equipo entregue valor continuo mediante una gestión clara del backlog , criterios de aceptación bien definidos y una visión alineada con objetivos del negocio, cumplimiento y experiencia del cliente. Responsabilidades clave Gestión de producto y valor Levantar y traducir necesidades del negocio en épicas, features y user stories claras y accionables. Priorizar el backlog con foco en valor, riesgo, dependencias y cumplimiento normativo. Definir objetivos, roadmap y alcance por releases junto a stakeholders. Definición funcional y calidad Elaborar requerimientos funcionales (flujos, reglas de negocio, excepciones) y criterios de aceptación. Asegurar consistencia del producto: journeys, casos borde, reglas transaccionales, mensajes al usuario. Validar entregables con negocio (UAT), asegurar trazabilidad y apoyar al equipo QA. Trabajo con stakeholders Facilitar workshops con áreas bancarias (canales, operaciones, riesgo, cumplimiento, tecnología). Gestionar expectativas, dependencias y decisiones, comunicando avances y riesgos de forma oportuna. Trabajo ágil Participar activamente en ceremonias ágiles (refinamiento, planning, daily, review, retrospectiva). Apoyar al equipo de desarrollo resolviendo dudas funcionales y manteniendo el alcance claro. Competencias Clave +5 años de experiencia como Product Owner, Analista Funcional Senior, Business Analyst o roles afines en productos digitales. Experiencia comprobada en sector bancario, idealmente en productos como: Cuentas, transferencias, pagos, tarjetas, créditos, onboarding, autenticación/autorización, core banking, conciliaciones. Dominio de prácticas ágiles: Gestión de backlog, priorización, definición de historias, criterios de aceptación, DoR/DoD. Capacidad de modelar procesos y reglas: BPMN (deseable), mapeo de procesos, documentación funcional, manejo de excepciones. Habilidad para negociar y alinear múltiples stakeholders, con comunicación clara y enfoque en resultados. Enfoque en calidad y control: trazabilidad de requerimientos, pruebas funcionales, UAT, gestión de cambios. Deseables (no excluyentes) Conocimiento de marcos/regulación y temas transversales: KYC, AML, SARLAFT, seguridad, privacidad, auditoría. Conocimiento de APIs e integración (entendimiento funcional de contratos, eventos, procesos). Experiencia en canales digitales (web/mobile) y mejora de journeys. Certificaciones: PSPO / CSPO / Scrum (deseable). Experiencia con herramientas: Jira, Confluence, Miro, Figma (lectura funcional), Azure DevOps. Lo que ofrecemos Salario competitivo acorde a tu experiencia. Desarrollo profesional: apoyo para formación continua y certificaciones. Bonificaciones por desempeño. Un ambiente centrado en tu crecimiento humano y profesional. Proyectos retadores con impacto real en banca y transformación digital. Si te apasiona liderar producto desde lo funcional, alinear negocio con tecnología y entregar valor continuo en el sector bancario, ¡únete a Keppri!

Description 📚 TripleTen is an award-winning online school among technology bootcamps. Our mission is to help people change their lives and succeed in technology. We offer flexibility in studies, career mentoring, resume and portfolio preparation, and we guarantee employment after the course. Our employability rate among graduates is 87% across our Web Development, Quality Assurance (QA), Data Analytics and Data Science programs. We're looking for a dynamic, results-driven Senior B2C Sales Team Leader to lead our LATAM team in selling our product across the Latin American market. ✏️ About the team: Our sales agents are based throughout LATAM and speak Spanish, but English is essential for internal communication with our marketing and operations teams. What You Will Do Hit the team sales quota by leading a team of up to 12 sales specialists. Hire, onboard, motivate and control the performance of your sales team. Together with Head of Sales and the Sales Country Manager implement changes in the workflow. Conduct group trainings and individual coaching sessions for the team members. Hit the team sales goals for the LATAM market. Ensure all processes and regulations are followed by the team members (lead processing in CRM, proper usage of the script). Provide reports on the team performance. Requirements Spanish language proficiency. Telemarketing or B2C sales experience (3+ years). Sales management experience (3+ years). Data analysis skills. Experience coaching and guiding sales teams. Strong soft and communication skills. Experience working with CRM. Highly motivated and target driven professional with a proven track record in sales management. Experience within Education, Ed-tech, Tech, Marketing, SaaS B2C, Insurance sector is a plus What We Can Offer You Basic payment of 1700 USD Gross + commissions. Overall payment is up to 3000 USD Gross per month. 100% remote and full-time position. International work experience in one of the most recognized companies in the market. Working hours: 5 working days, two days off per week. En el momento no consideramos candidatos de Venezuela (ya que no poseemos proveedores de pagos en el país).

Únete al banco más grande de Ecuador y sé parte de la revolución tecnológica en el sector financiero. Buscamos un Semi Senior / Senior Java Developer apasionado por la calidad y la seguridad del software, con experiencia en QA, DevOps y buenas prácticas de desarrollo , que garantice aplicaciones robustas y eficientes para millones de usuarios. Para trabajar de forma remota desde cualquier lugar de América Latina e hibrido si te encuentras en la ciudad de Quito . Trabajarás en un entorno ágil, con un equipo increíble en la implementación de productos de software de clase mundial. Responsabilidades: Desarrollar y mantener aplicaciones en Java (Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Microservicios). Seguir buenas prácticas de calidad y revisar tu propio código para garantizar su estabilidad. Implementar y ejecutar pruebas automatizadas básicas para validar la funcionalidad de los desarrollos. Identificar y solucionar problemas en pipelines y despliegues, sin necesidad de crearlos desde cero. Aplicar buenas prácticas de seguridad en el desarrollo para prevenir vulnerabilidades y garantizar cumplimiento con estándares internos. Requirements +5 años de experiencia en desarrollo Java (Spring Boot, Microservicios, APIs REST). Atención al detalle para asegurar código limpio y de calidad. Conocimientos en pruebas automatizadas (JUnit, TestNG, Selenium, Cypress o similares). Experiencia básica en pipelines con herramientas como GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Jenkins o Azure DevOps. Capacidad para solucionar problemas de despliegue y pipelines, sin necesidad de diseñarlos desde cero. Conocimiento de buenas prácticas de seguridad (OWASP, validaciones, gestión de credenciales). Experiencia con metodologías ágiles (Scrum, Kanban) Benefits En Devsu, queremos crear un ambiente donde puedas prosperar tanto personal como profesionalmente. Al unirte a nuestro equipo, disfrutarás de: Un contrato estable a largo plazo con oportunidades de crecimiento profesional Seguro médico privado Programas continuos de capacitación, mentoría y aprendizaje para mantenerte a la vanguardia de la industria Acceso gratuito a recursos de capacitación en IA y herramientas de IA de última generación para elevar tu trabajo diario Una política flexible de tiempo libre remunerado (PTO) además de días festivos pagados Proyectos de software desafiantes de clase mundial para clientes en Estados Unidos y Latinoamérica Colaboración con algunos de los ingenieros de software más talentosos de Latinoamérica y Estados Unidos, en un entorno de trabajo diverso Únete a Devsu y descubre un lugar de trabajo que valora tu crecimiento, apoya tu bienestar y te empodera para generar un impacto global.

LOCATION: This role is a hybrid role and will need to report three days a week to the offices based in Quito or Guayaquil, Ecuador. POSITION PURPOSE: The Full Stack Digital Developer is responsible for designing, developing, and enhancing modern digital applications that support Best Doctors Insurance digital transformation strategy. This role has a strong emphasis on front end ownership while contributing to backend services within the Microsoft technology ecosystem. The position plays a critical role in delivering intuitive, scalable, and secure digital solutions that enable world class experiences for members, insureds, agents, partners, and internal operations teams. A key focus is ensuring optimal performance and exceptional user experience by leveraging state of the art technologies and development best practices. As a hands on Mid to Senior individual contributor, the Full Stack Digital Developer works closely with cross functional stakeholders to deliver high quality, end to end digital solutions across web, mobile, and related platforms, aligned with business objectives. The role is expected to proactively implement innovative solutions that prioritize seamless user interactions, robust application performance, and the adoption of cutting edge frameworks and tools to maintain a competitive edge in the digital landscape. ESSENTIAL JOB DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES: Design, develop, and maintain high quality, responsive front end applications using React and Kendo UI. Build and enhance cross platform mobile and desktop applications using .NET MAUI for Android, iOS, and Windows. Design, develop, and maintain backend services and business logic using .NET C sharp (.NET Framework and .NET Core). Develop and consume RESTful APIs to support front end, mobile, and system integration requirements. Collaborate with Product, UX, QA, Operations, and Business teams to translate business needs into technical solutions. Optimize application performance, scalability, security, and maintainability. Participate actively in Agile ceremonies, technical planning, architecture discussions, and code reviews. Write clean, well documented, and maintainable code following internal standards and industry best practices. Support and evolve digital portals, mobile applications, and internal platforms across Best Doctors Insurance. Contribute to modernization initiatives, including migration from legacy systems to modern Microsoft technologies. Ensure adherence to secure coding practices, data protection standards, and regulatory requirements relevant to the insurance industry. REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS: Education and Experience Bachelor's degree in a technology related field or equivalent experience. 5 plus years of professional experience in software development (full stack or front end focused). Demonstrated hands on experience delivering production grade applications in a Microsoft based environment. Experience supporting legacy .NET Framework applications while contributing to modernization initiatives using .NET. Technical Skills Strong expertise in .NET C sharp. Proficiency with React, JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3. Experience with Kendo UI for component rich front end development. Experience building cross platform mobile applications using .NET MAUI. Experience designing and maintaining REST APIs. Experience with relational databases (SQL Server preferred). Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms (OAuth 2.0, JWT). Familiarity with common architecture patterns (MVC, MVVM, layered architecture, microservices). Experience working within DevOps and change controlled environments. Language Skills English and Spanish DESIRABLE QUALIFICATIONS: Familiarity with Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI). Experience with Microsoft Azure services (App Services, Azure Functions, API Management, Storage). Experience using Git, Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing frameworks. Knowledge of secure coding, identity management, and data protection practices. Experience in healthcare, insurance, or other regulated industries. Practical use of AI assisted development tools to improve productivity, quality, or solution design. SOFT SKILLS AND COMPETENCIES: Strong problem solving and analytical skills. Excellent communication and collaboration abilities. Ability to translate business requirements into effective technical solutions. High attention to detail and strong commitment to quality. Proactive, adaptable, and innovation oriented mindset. Ability to work effectively in fast paced, globally distributed teams.

WHO ARE WE? Launch Potato is a profitable digital media company that reaches over 30M+ monthly visitors through brands such as FinanceBuzz, All About Cookies, and OnlyInYourState. As The Discovery and Conversion Company, our mission is to connect consumers with the world’s leading brands through data-driven content and technology. Headquartered in South Florida with a remote-first team spanning over 15 countries, we’ve built a high-growth, high-performance culture where speed, ownership, and measurable impact drive success. WHY JOIN US? At Launch Potato, you’ll accelerate your career by owning outcomes, moving fast, and driving impact with a global team of high-performers. WHY YOU WANT THIS ROLE: Ready to level up your media buying career with a world-class US company—all from the comfort of your home? This is your chance to grow into a Media Buying expert, managing large-scale budgets and driving real results for top advertisers. No prior native experience? No problem. We’ll guide you with mentorship, data-driven strategies, and hands-on training across platforms like Taboola and Outbrain. At Launch Potato, you'll collaborate with a diverse, high-performing team across the Americas, gaining global experience in one of the most exciting spaces in digital media: Finance and Money Management. If you’re looking for a role where you’re trusted, supported, and set up to thrive, this is it. MUST HAVE: Hands-on experience running social or native ad campaigns across platforms like Meta, TikTok, Pinterest, Taboola, Outbrain Proven ability to monitor and optimize campaign performance using data Strong attention to detail with a focus on executional excellence and task management Ability to collaborate across functions and communicate clearly in a remote work environment Display an attitude of positivity and willingness to embrace change, not getting discouraged when business or cross-functional needs change Passion for performance marketing and a desire to grow within the Make Money/Manage Money vertical of our largest brand, FinanceBuzz This role will require occasional campaign monitoring after hours or on weekends, as needed. EXPERIENCE: 3+ years of media buying experience, with a focus on performance-driven results across social and native ad campaigns YOUR ROLE Support the success and growth of our Make Money/Manage Money native and social media campaigns by executing campaign builds, monitoring performance, and assisting in optimizations that help scale winning strategies. OUTCOMES Execute and manage social and native ad campaigns across platforms such Meta and Taboola Monitor daily performance metrics and implement optimizations to creative, bids, and placements Partner with senior media buyers to launch new campaigns and expand existing ones while supporting strategic growth Facilitate creative testing by assisting with copy iteration, image/video swaps, and tracking results Conduct competitor research and performance audits to surface new testing opportunities Collaborate with the Content and Paid Media teams to ensure seamless campaign setup and timely asset delivery Maintain campaign documentation and update performance trackers regularly to support team throughput COMPETENCIES Execution-Oriented: Manages deliverables independently and consistently follows through on tasks that enable campaign momentum and growth. Detail-Driven: Demonstrates accuracy in reporting, campaign QA, and implementation of optimizations. Organized and Fast-Learning: You prioritize competing tasks effectively and quickly pick up on new trends or approaches to optimize your campaigns. Analytical Thinker: Understand key ad metrics and translate data into actionable strategies that improve funnel performance. Collaborative: Works effectively across team lines with buyers, content creators, and analysts to move campaigns forward. Curious & Analytical: Asks the right questions, seeks to understand performance drivers, and uses data to guide recommendations. Proactive Communicator: Provides regular updates, flags issues early, and clearly communicates changes or learnings to stakeholders. Coachability: Open to feedback, quickly applies learnings, and demonstrates a strong desire to grow into a more strategic buyer. Want to accelerate your career? Apply now! Since day one, we've been committed to having a diverse, inclusive team and culture. We are proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity company. We value diversity, equity, and inclusion. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

About Toptal Toptal is a global network of top talent in business, design, and technology that enables companies to scale their teams, on-demand. With $200+ million in annual revenue and team members based around the globe , Toptal is the world’s largest fully remote workforce. We take the best elements of virtual teams and combine them with a support structure that encourages innovation, social interaction, and fun. We see no borders, move at a fast pace, and are never afraid to break the mold. Job Summary: We’re looking for a results-driven Marketing Specialist to support and execute key marketing initiatives across email, content, SEO, and social media. This role is primarily focused on email marketing, automation, optimization, and analysis, and requires deep expertise in Marketing Automation (ideally in Salesforce Marketing Cloud). The ideal candidate will also be able to create high-quality written content for blogs, SEO, and social channels. This is a remote position. We do not offer visa sponsorship or assistance. Resumes and communication must be submitted in English. Responsibilities: Email Marketing, Automation, Optimization, and Analysis Own the execution of email marketing campaigns from planning through deployment, QA, testing, reporting, and optimization. Build, manage, and optimize automated journeys, campaigns, and audience segmentation in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. Develop email content aligned with campaign goals, brand voice, and audience needs. Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, copy, CTAs, send times, and audience segments to improve performance. Monitor and analyze campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and other KPIs. Apply best practices across deliverability, compliance, personalization, and lifecycle marketing. Translate campaign insights into actionable recommendations to improve future performance. Blog and SEO Writing Write and edit high-quality blog content aligned with brand messaging, audience interests, and SEO goals, while exercising discretion and independent judgment. Create SEO-focused content and optimize written content for target keywords, search intent, readability, and internal linking. Refresh and optimize existing blog content to improve rankings and performance. Ensure all written content is clear, accurate, engaging, and on-brand. Social Media Content Create compelling social media copy and content concepts that support broader campaign and content objectives. Support the content calendar with consistent, brand-aligned content across relevant channels. Adapt campaign, blog, and email messaging into channel-appropriate social content. Monitor content performance and recommend improvements based on engagement data and audience response. Qualifications and Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree is required. 5+ years of experience in marketing with strong emphasis on email marketing and automation. If not familiar with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, willingness to quickly adapt to it. Strong experience writing marketing content across email, blog, SEO, and social media formats. Strong understanding of SEO and on-page optimization best practices. Experience with audience segmentation, email testing, and campaign optimization. Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into actionable recommendations. Strong attention to detail, organization, and project management skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced environment. Collaborative mindset with the ability to work cross-functionally and independently. You must be a world-class individual contributor to thrive at Toptal. You will not be here just to tell other people what to do. Nice to Have: Experience in B2B marketing Knowledge of Salesforce Marketing Cloud, including hands-on experience with Journey Builder, Automation Studio, Email Studio, Content Builder, and Contact Builder Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email formatting and minor template edits Familiarity with SQL or AMPscript within Salesforce Marketing Cloud Experience using analytics and reporting tools to measure content and campaign performance

We are looking for a Senior Project Manager who can bring structure, clarity, and delivery discipline to a complex and fast-moving engineering environment. This role requires a strong leader who can stabilize workflows, enforce SDLC best practices, fix Jira process gaps, and align cross-functional teams including Product, Engineering, QA, and Leadership. Your mission is to reduce rework, protect the team from chaos, improve visibility across the organization, and ensure predictable, controlled delivery of software release Key Responsibilities Project Planning & Release Roadmapping Build and manage the release roadmap (MVP + subsequent phases). Clarify scope, objectives, and dependencies for each release. Establish quarterly goals, milestone planning, and delivery checkpoints. Agile & Sprint Execution Own sprint planning, grooming, execution, and end-of-sprint reporting. Define and enforce DOR, DOD, velocity tracking, and capacity planning. Ensure sprint commitments are realistic and achievable. Jira Workflow Governance Redesign Jira workflow to match the real SDLC lifecycle. Consolidate multiple boards into a single source of truth. Ensure every ticket has clear AC, owner, priority, estimate, and correct status. Cross-Functional Coordination Lead weekly alignment meetings with CPO, PO, CTO, Dev Leads, QA Lead. About Toptal Toptal is a global network of top talent in business, design, and technology that enables companies to scale their teams, on-demand. With $200+ million in annual revenue and team members based around the globe , Toptal is the world’s largest fully remote workforce. We take the best elements of virtual teams and combine them with a support structure that encourages innovation, social interaction, and fun. We see no borders, move at a fast pace, and are never afraid to break the mold. Job Summary: We’re looking for a results-driven Marketing Specialist to support and execute key marketing initiatives across email, content, SEO, and social media. This role is primarily focused on email marketing, automation, optimization, and analysis, and requires deep expertise in Marketing Automation (ideally in Salesforce Marketing Cloud). The ideal candidate will also be able to create high-quality written content for blogs, SEO, and social channels. This is a remote position. We do not offer visa sponsorship or assistance. Resumes and communication must be submitted in English. Responsibilities: Email Marketing, Automation, Optimization, and Analysis Own the execution of email marketing campaigns from planning through deployment, QA, testing, reporting, and optimization. Build, manage, and optimize automated journeys, campaigns, and audience segmentation in Salesforce Marketing Cloud. Develop email content aligned with campaign goals, brand voice, and audience needs. Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, copy, CTAs, send times, and audience segments to improve performance. Monitor and analyze campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and other KPIs. Apply best practices across deliverability, compliance, personalization, and lifecycle marketing. Translate campaign insights into actionable recommendations to improve future performance. Blog and SEO Writing Write and edit high-quality blog content aligned with brand messaging, audience interests, and SEO goals, while exercising discretion and independent judgment. Create SEO-focused content and optimize written content for target keywords, search intent, readability, and internal linking. Refresh and optimize existing blog content to improve rankings and performance. Ensure all written content is clear, accurate, engaging, and on-brand. Social Media Content Create compelling social media copy and content concepts that support broader campaign and content objectives. Support the content calendar with consistent, brand-aligned content across relevant channels. Adapt campaign, blog, and email messaging into channel-appropriate social content. Monitor content performance and recommend improvements based on engagement data and audience response. Qualifications and Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree is required. 5+ years of experience in marketing with strong emphasis on email marketing and automation. If not familiar with Salesforce Marketing Cloud, willingness to quickly adapt to it. Strong experience writing marketing content across email, blog, SEO, and social media formats. Strong understanding of SEO and on-page optimization best practices. Experience with audience segmentation, email testing, and campaign optimization. Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into actionable recommendations. Strong attention to detail, organization, and project management skills. Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced environment. Collaborative mindset with the ability to work cross-functionally and independently. You must be a world-class individual contributor to thrive at Toptal. You will not be here just to tell other people what to do. Nice to Have: Experience in B2B marketing Knowledge of Salesforce Marketing Cloud, including hands-on experience with Journey Builder, Automation Studio, Email Studio, Content Builder, and Contact Builder Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email formatting and minor template edits Familiarity with SQL or AMPscript within Salesforce Marketing Cloud Experience using analytics and reporting tools to measure content and campaign performance For Toptal Use Only: #centralamerica #southamerica #canada

Collaborate closely with project managers and leadership on scheduling, priorities, and resource planning . What We’re Looking For Advanced English proficiency ( absolutely mandatory ). Strong background in Electrical BIM / VDC for complex construction projects. Proven experience leading or coordinating electrical BIM teams or scopes . Solid knowledge of electrical construction standards, codes, and field practices . Advanced hands-on experience with Revit, Navisworks , and BIM coordination workflows. Ability to balance hands-on technical work with leadership and coordination. Strong communication skills, especially in multidisciplinary and client-facing environments .
